## Checklist

- [ ] `devtools::document()` run (if roxygen changed)
- [ ] `devtools::test()` passes
- [ ] `devtools::check()` is clean (0 errors / 0 warnings / 0 notes)
- [ ] New/changed behaviour has tests
- [ ] R source remains English and ASCII-only
- [ ] Core guarantees preserved (determinism; positive final sample size; no
      fabricated sample; no default cross-province borrowing)
- [ ] `NEWS.md` updated for user-visible changes
